name: Biztopia
short_description: Welcome to Biztopia! A unique trading city full of business and opportunities awaits you! Start with a small delivery, build your own trading world, and team up with friends to shape the city and discover the next big venture!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Biztopia!

You step into the city as a child of a wealthy family. One day, all your family's wealth will be yours... Your father wants to see your skills and potential, so he refrains from offering direct support; your uncle, however, can't bear to see you struggle, supports you, and mentors you closely. What begins as a small delivery will take you to places you never expected. It all starts with you! Are you ready for the challenge?

🤝 Co-op Experience
Join forces with your friends and grow your business! The city will take shape in your hands and your team’s.

🏭 Smart Warehouses & Logistics
Your warehouse is the heart of your trading journey. Small and limited at first, but you can customize and expand it over time. Faster deliveries, bigger profits, and full control are in your hands!

🚚 Levels of Trade
From local online orders to city deliveries, from there to international containers and global trade networks leadership, a journey awaits you. At every step, new opportunities, investment options, and larger markets will knock on your door. A small start can take you to the heart of global trade!

🚗 Vehicles & Transportation
Explore the city with different types and colors of vehicles, fuel management, and parking stations. Cover long distances quickly via bus stops and phone booths. Don’t miss any opportunities and turn the city into your trading domain!

⛽ Gas Station
Vehicles have multiple fuel types, so refueling empty vehicles is your responsibility. And of course, fuel prices fluctuate with inflation!

🏦 Advanced Banking & Investment
Banking is more than just loans! Grow your capital with interest-bearing deposits and investment instruments. Invest in gold and BizCoin for short- or long-term gains and strengthen your trade. Your profit depends on your strategy; manage risk and seize opportunities!

🎨 Styler Shop & Character Customization
Shape your character with 200+ items to reflect your personal style. Stand out and show your style in Biztopia!

🔬 R&D Center
Enhance your trade with 70+ research options, increase order probability, and reduce risks. Every research, every strategic move puts you ahead of competitors. Research, implement, and win!

🌟 Reputation & Missions
Complete missions on time, plan your strategy correctly, and earn reputation. High reputation brings advantageous orders and prestigious opportunities.

💼 Surprise Ventures
E-commerce is just the beginning! New business opportunities, ventures, and investment areas await you.

In Biztopia, there are no limits! Your adventure, starting with small steps, turns into a limitless world of trade. Start now and write your own story!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Bulgarian, Danish, Indonesian, Dutch, Finnish, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Greek, Czech, Swedish, Arabic, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
